Localization.Description: The rule detects local privilege escalation via a buffer overflow. Attackers using the CVE-2023-4911 vulnerability can start SUID programs to execute code with elevated privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Local elevation of privileges by the user {subject.account.name} through the launch of a malicious utility {subject.process.name}, which caused buffer overflows and the start of the process {object.process.name} on the node {event_src.host}
